transcript: Turner and Sabonis former teammates jumping it at the circle and Halliburton will bring it across matched up against Bonds. I think Keegan was actually a little surprised by that pass though wasn't watching as he cut and with Domas you got to always have your eyes on the ball. Siakam for three got it. Pascal Siakam shooting 43 percent. Sab a bonus at the elbow sprays it out to DeRozan little pump fake got it Murray switches on to him skip pass to the corner Nembhard pulls man that thing was in the air so long it should have had a movie on it. That went inside, got peeled, and stripped by Monk. That is his second here early in this game. Fox. Caught him. Here in box with a basket. Just turned 27 on the 20th of December a couple of days ago. Turner over DeRozan. Out of the timeout, they go to DeRozan at the mid-post against Halliburton. Double team comes on the bounce, one more pass, and Fox knocks it home. Turner inside, topping with a mismatch against Herter. Back out to shipper for three and another three ball this one falls for the Pacers there's fun for three and another three ball. This one falls for the Pacers. There's Monk touching paint. A little float game, you heard him. He's got his own speaker box. Herter on the drive with the deceleration, couldn't convert, got the second one to ball. Kevin Herter working against Herter. Around the screen by Turner. Toppin from the wing, got it. Now four of 13 from deep. Sabonis inside with the right hand. That's a shot that he's been working with assistant coach Doug Christie it's always easier and more accurate with your off hand weird because your dominant hand is so trained and used to a certain way it's that top hand where you usually have a better touch well his strong hand was working on that slam Katie it's a blast trying to close out possession there's Fox against Siakam that's a mismatch. De'Aaron gets whatever he wants. Four on the shot clock for Siakam against Herter. Forced to take a long two. McConnell has another opportunity. What a pass inside for the flush. T.J. McConnell. Down Kings on the glass but they're so spread out is Indiana because they take so many threes there's not a lot of bodies to get on and keegan murray with a nice hook jam inside you say do it yourself kid i say check the air in the ball i think it's about gone heard her one more mcdermott that's the right guy for the job and he got it as consistently as we would like to see but he will get better Matherin got inside tough bucket through traffic Siakam against Fox Fox takes that mismatch personally out to the wing and that jumper falls through at the expiration of the shot clock Bryant Monk missed it it's a bonus for the offensive rebound Herterter wide open from deep, Kevin Herter brought some smoke to this game tonight, Nebhardt skip pass to the corner, Walker, tough move inside and got the fortuitous roll, up on the low block and having him go to work and not moving his defender at all deep three Halliburton rips poured he's already got 11 rebounds in this game back tapped by Nembhard and he'll get some room service at the other end the Rosen box with a quick post up inside Sabonis goes to the jump hook And that one finds nothing but net The types of things That he does Trust me I know I had low back issues Oh Bunk is flying private jet Good help by Sabonis Couldn't get back to Turner in time And the Pacers with smart offense there. Miles a little bit more apt to pull them than Domas, so. Hurry out to Sabonis, a clean look from deep. Why not? Nice answer. Atherin. Shot clock down to four. You don't want a foul here. Turner with a long two. Wow, that's two in a row Yeah, Aaron, I don't know if you can hear it there Trying to implore his team defensively after that made bucket About rotations, communication Bucs got to the rim It's one thing for him to go out there and score the way that he does Like he did last night Being vocal is so imperative for him you got a hand up on that Halliburton three just box into the front court off the Sabonis screen Monk off the pin got it great design and execution by the Kings the 58 million dollar defender Embart almost caused a turnover got a deflection there, but it got to Monk at the buzzer! Got it! Malik! Nembhard was a guy who was sorely missed early. Nice dive inside to Turner for the slam. Tell you what, Turner has done a nice job defending inside against him tonight. Well, and really against everyone, if you look at it, I mean, in the first half, King shot less than 42%. They're done a nice job defending inside yeah against him tonight well and really against everyone if you look at it i mean in the first half king shot less than 42 they're doing a great job communicating switching pushing them outside of the areas of operation not fox on a mismatch down low and once the acklam shooting 30 from the field one of four from downtown the rose and one more to murray got a clean look from deep and cashes out now by four there's nevbark siakam one more to halliburton the high arching three griggs ford again pacers really spread you out in this five out that they run halliburton has fallen definitely silent so far Nice cut by Lyles Monk off the screen from Lyles Lyles on the show and go Pacers recovering defensively, a contested three Doesn't matter to Malik Monk Knocks it down anyway An offensive style very much like you would see down at the Y Yes Great ball movement You don't see that at the YMCA We'll be right back. Knocks it down anyway. An offensive style very much like you would see down at the Y. Yes. Great ball movement. You don't see that at the YMCA. Malik. Boy, a couple of great opportunities by Fox and Lyles respectively. And back the other way, Indiana leading by 10. McConnell probing inside over Lyles. Tough bucket. Dermott on McConnell. Now he's trying to stick Siakam. Tough mid-range. Pascal Siakam is pretty good in the mid-range. And I'm telling you, here goes Keegan Murray. Whistle and one. Got it. Little zone look by Sacramento. And Shepard knocks down the corner three three game losing streak they've come oh so close a couple of times and they got a little bit of a hill to climb tj mcconnell they're kind of ahead of the pack and maybe they can get some wide open layups but it has to start on the defensive end and getting some stops to be able to Run. All right point guard. We will hear from you with Kyle after the game as Pascal Siakam more total passes Nice pocket pass by Fox into Sabonis Got it back and made sure that the second time got airborne with no one to pass it to three on two the other way McConnell sprays it out to Shepherd on the wing sometimes these things can be good but we're talking about it earlier mark the Western Conference is not something to invest with and you can find yourself in a bad way to put yourself in those situations not a formula for success Halliburton grazing the iron Fox on the break rips through and got it with the offhand Ryan flipped the screen that allows Halliburton to get in sky for the scoop shot Orlando Robinson as well as Mike Brown is gonna give it to a difference by Jairus Walker with the punch at the other end as we approach two minutes to go the Indiana Pacers in command Walker threw it off the glass and then passed it to Brian they're out here doing mixtapes right now and brazenness. But it worked out. And to the victors go the spoils. Yes. Johnson on the baseline. And the Pacers. Jones spins and pulls. Got it to go off glass. Folks, trust me on this one do not try him that'll do it Sacramento Kings will lose it 122-95 and the fans in the arena not pleased with what they have seen here. We'll see you next time.
